name: Card
description: A card groups related content and actions about a single subject — a vehicle summary, a KPI, an alert. Cards make a dashboard scannable by giving each thing its own contained surface. Card itself (extends Paper) is only the outer surface — title/media/actions come from composing sibling MUI components (CardHeader, CardContent, CardMedia, CardActions, CardActionArea) inside it.
keyRule: Use a card to collect everything about one entity. If you're listing many comparable records, a data table (DataGrid) is usually clearer than a wall of cards.

variants.name: Elevated
variants.whenToUse: Default — `variant="elevation"` (the real MUI default), a subtle shadow lifts the card off the page.

variants.name: Outlined
variants.whenToUse: `variant="outlined"` — flatter surfaces / dense dashboards where shadows add noise.

variants.name: Raised
variants.whenToUse: `raised` bumps an elevation-variant card to elevation 8 for extra emphasis (ignored when `variant="outlined"`).

variants.name: With media
variants.whenToUse: Compose a `CardMedia` child when an image/map adds context (vehicle photo, location).

variants.name: Actionable (whole-card)
variants.whenToUse: Compose a `CardActionArea` child so the entire card navigates to detail with a ripple + focus ring.

anatomy.name: Container
anatomy.description: the Paper-based surface (4px radius) — this component. Accepts `variant`, `raised`, and any Paper/sx prop.

anatomy.name: CardMedia
anatomy.description: sibling component — optional image/map thumbnail region.

anatomy.name: CardHeader
anatomy.description: sibling component — title, subtitle, optional avatar and overflow action.

anatomy.name: CardContent
anatomy.description: sibling component — supporting text, KPIs, or a small table.

anatomy.name: CardActions
anatomy.description: sibling component — a row of buttons (usually text/outlined).

behaviors.name: Actions
behaviors.description: Keep CardActions buttons low-emphasis (text/outlined); reserve the contained button for the page's primary action.

behaviors.name: Whole-card click
behaviors.description: If the card is clickable, wrap the content in CardActionArea rather than an onClick on Card itself, so hover/focus/ripple are handled correctly.

behaviors.name: Density
behaviors.description: On dashboards, prefer compact cards in a grid; align heights for a tidy grid.

states.treatment: State-layer overlay from CardActionArea, not Card itself.

specs.value: 1 (resting, variant="elevation"); 8 when `raised`; none (border only) when variant="outlined"
16px — applied by CardContent, not Card itself
Roboto 16px/500 · 14px/400 on-surface-medium — applied by CardHeader's title/subheader, not Card itself

props.name: children
props.description: Typically CardMedia / CardHeader / CardContent / CardActions composed inside.

props.name: variant
props.description: 'outlined' removes the elevation shadow in favor of a divider border. 'elevation' is the real MUI default.

props.name: raised
props.description: Bumps elevation to 8 for extra emphasis. Only applies when variant="elevation". Default false.

props.name: sx
props.description: MUI system prop for one-off style overrides.

doThis: Align cards into a tidy grid on dashboards.
Use CardActionArea (not a raw onClick) for whole-card navigation.
dontDoThis: Don't replace a comparable-records table with many cards.
Don't stack multiple contained buttons in a card.
accessibility: CardHeader's title should be a real heading level appropriate to the page structure.
An actionable card built with CardActionArea exposes a single accessible interactive target; don't also nest separate interactive controls that compete with the card click.
Focus is visible and order is logical.

related.name: DataGrid
related.why: When operators compare many records, use a table, not many cards

related.name: Accordion
related.why: Collapsible content that stays in the page flow
